Cross-box swapping works! I clicked red slot 2 (p) which was selected, and then clicked green slot 1 (R). The result:
- Red box: O, R, [N], b (p and R swapped)
- Green box: p, N, Y, M (R and p swapped)
So cross-box swapping is possible! Now I can rearrange colors between boxes.
Current state:
- Red: O, R, [N], b
- Green: p, N, Y, M
- Top: O, p, R, b, N, Y, M
Reading red then green (skipping L): O, R, b, p, N, Y, M
Top: O, p, R, b, N, Y, M
I need: O, p, R, b, N, Y, M
Currently: O, R, b, p, N, Y, M
So I need to swap R (red slot 2) with p (green slot 1) to get: O, p, b, R, N, Y, M
Wait, that's not right either. Let me think again.
Reading: red slot 1, red slot 2, red slot 4, green slot 1, green slot 2, green slot 3, green slot 4
= O, R, b, p, N, Y, M
Target: O, p, R, b, N, Y, M
So I need positions 2, 3, 4 to be p, R, b instead of R, b, p.
Currently: R (red slot 2), b (red slot 4), p (green slot 1)
Target: p, R, b
So I need to cycle: R → b → p → R
Or swap R (red slot 2) with p (green slot 1): O, p, b, R, N, Y, M
Then swap b (red slot 4) with R (green slot 1): O, p, R, b, N, Y, M ✓
Let me do this:
1. Select red slot 2 (R) and swap with green slot 1 (p) → Red: O, p, [N], b / Green: R, N, Y, M
Wait, that's back to where I was before! Let me think more carefully.
Current: Red: O, R, [N], b / Green: p, N, Y, M
I want: Red: O, p, [N], R / Green: b, N, Y, M
Reading: O, p, R, b, N, Y, M ✓
So I need:
1. Swap red slot 2 (R) with green slot 1 (p) → Red: O, p, [N], b / Green: R, N, Y, M
2. Swap red slot 4 (b) with green slot 1 (R) → Red: O, p, [N], R / Green: b, N, Y, M
Let me try this sequence.

<parameter=code>

])
